title: rutidea parviflora
intro: Rutidea parviflora, also known as the African Dog Flower or Small-flowered Rutidea, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Rutidea parviflora has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Rutidea parviflora can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional remedies in West Africa.
